title: Deez FPS
description: Are you lagging?? With these modpack you don't need to worry!! What is lag after using this?
body:

## **About**

Deez FPS is one of the best FPS modpacks you can find right now! Using Sodium and some  Crazy FPS Boost Mods. This ModPack will blow ur FPS

<details>
    <summary>PC Config</summary>
  
- **Cpu: Ryzen 7 3700X.**
  
- **Gpu: RTX 2060.**
  
- **Ram: 16GB - DDR4.**
</details>

## **Compatibility**

Deez FPS is compatible with all the launchers, is still not official if it works with all but half of them.

## **FPS Comparison**

You can check the gallery I made, I tested some with vanilla, lunar client, fabulously optimized and deez fps of course **[ I didn't cheat, I didn't fake anything 100% reliable, It's not guarantee you will get the same fps like mine.**

**Deez FPS :**
![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dfN0V6ij/images/9056738eb3d89ccdbb12cd16eeaec18f41a0d969.jpeg)

**Fabulously Optimized :**
![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dfN0V6ij/images/a40266654ca098c88cee600b87fb2a750ac8e1ab.jpeg)

**Lunar Client :**
![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dfN0V6ij/images/b01b8a8b327bda046a5661d99c5598375231f59b.jpeg)


## **Shaders**

Yes, This Modpack Support Shaders

## **Connected Textures**

Yes, Deez FPS support connected textures and some optifine features.

## **Tweaks**

**Deez Fps** includes a few minor tweaks, such as [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix/version/1.10), [ItemSwapper](https://modrinth.com/plugin/itemswapper/version/v0.4.0-1.19.4), [AntiGhost](https://modrinth.com/mod/antighost/version/1.19.3-fabric0.68.1-1.1.5), [Smooth Boot](https://modrinth.com/mod/smoothboot-fabric/version/1.19.4-1.7.0), [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky/version/1.3.74), [Mouse Tweaks
](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks/version/1.19.4-2.24-fabric ) [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights/version/2.3.0+1.19.4) etc....


## **Loader**

Built on Fabric is a lightweight, experimental modding tool chain for Minecraft, not like Forge.

## **Support**

If you need support or you have any question, you can join the discord, where there are mods and admins to assist you. Here is the link: [DISCORD](https://discord.gg/5xPK78c6cX )

## **LOGO**

If you need the logo for youtube videos or presentations, I can send you 4 versions or more just send a message to my Discord: **virgino** or join the **[Discord](https://discord.gg/5QCXzTGKx5 )**.
